buildCommand: cd ../.. && pnpm turbo run build --filter='@eigenlex/web^...' && curl -fSL 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/matthewreagan/WebstersEnglishDictionary/master/dictionary.json' -o apps/web/data/webster-full.json && pnpm --filter @eigenlex/web build:model && pnpm turbo run build --filter=@eigenlex/web
